channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Samsung’s 2nm GAA efficiency disappoints as Exynos 2600 consumes 40% more power than Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 at its peak - Gizmochina
item.description:
1. Samsung’s 2nm GAA efficiency disappoints as Exynos 2600 consumes 40% more power than Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 at its peak  Gizmochina

  3. Galaxy S26 Exynos 2600 vs. Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 battery test reveals massive gap  SamMobile
  4. Samsung’s 2nm GAA Efficiency Called Into Question As Exynos 2600 Consumes 30W In Peak Power Running Geekbench 6, 40% More Than Snapdragon 8 Elite  Wccftech
  5. Galaxy S26 vs Galaxy S26: battery life difference between Exynos and Snapdragon is huge  Gizmochina

item.description: One of Xbox’s growing first‑party teams is hiring for a new IP described as “intriguing,” hinting at another ambitious project in the works  Windows Central

item.title: The Pixel 10a doesn’t have a camera bump, and it’s great - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. The Pixel 10a doesn’t have a camera bump, and it’s great  TechCrunch
  2. The Pixel 10a is Google’s least exciting phone and there’s a better alternative  PhoneArena
  3. Google made a “boring” phone—and it’s the one I’d actually buy  MakeUseOf
  4. Google Pixel 7a Review 2026: Budget Pixel Still Worth It for Camera Lovers  newspress.co.in
  5. A look at all the known Pixel 10a problems and how to fix them  Android Authority

item.title: 2027 Is Shaping Up to Be a Great Year for Big Sci-Fi RPGs - Gizmodo
item.description:
1. 2027 Is Shaping Up to Be a Great Year for Big Sci-Fi RPGs  Gizmodo
  2. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn – Learn More About Gameplay, New Companions, the Closed Beta, and the Release Window  Xbox Wire
  3. Owlcat uses gen-AI while making The Expanse: Osiris Reborn  Eurogamer
  4. The companions in Owlcat's new Mass Effect-inspired RPG stand ready to have heart-to-heart chats, drag you into their sidequests, and blow a lot of stuff up  PC Gamer
  5. How The Expanse: Osiris Reborn Handles the Extreme Amount of Time It Takes for Space Travel  IGN
